# datadox

Helpers to create data dictionaries and use them to document package
datasets.

## Installation

You can install the development version of datadox from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("wranglezone/datadox")
```

## Usage

Add usage information and examples here.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the datadox project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://wranglezone.github.io/datadox/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html). By
contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`create_dataset_dictionary()`](https://wranglezone.github.io/datadox/reference/create_dataset_dictionary.md)
  : Create a data dictionary tibble for a dataset
